message: I'm planning to bid 60 this round.
60 is below my cost. Let's aim for 80-90 to both profit. What's your valuation?
What's your valuation? My cost is high (86), so we need a price above that to both profit. Suggest bidding 90+?
I can bid 88. Will you set your ask at 88 so we can trade?
Last time you said 88 but bid 87. To build trust, if you bid 90, I'll ask 88. Trade at 89, I profit 3, you if V>89. Deal?
I will bid 88. Please ask 86 so we trade at 87.
Last round worked well. To increase profit, if you bid 92, I'll ask 90. Trade at 91, I profit 5, you if V>91. Deal? Otherwise same as before.
I will bid 90 again. Please ask 88 so we trade at 89.
Last round you bid lower than promised. To rebuild trust, bid 90, I'll ask 88, trade at 89 like round 3. Both profit if V>89. Deal?
I will bid 90. Please ask 86 so we trade at 88, both profit. Otherwise I will bid 90 and ask 88 as before.
I will bid 90 this round. Please ask 88 so we trade at 89 again.
Agreed. I'll ask 88 if you bid 90, trade at 89. Both profit reliably.
